packet.aspect_ratio_reason: Wide aspect ratio ideal for website backgrounds, presentations, and marketing banners to showcase an inviting home office environment.
packet.positive_prompt: Cozy, well-organized home office desk with minimalist design, open laptop with generic screen, indoor houseplants, coffee mug, warm natural light streaming through window, neutral color palette, clean and clutter-free workspace, no people, no logos, no text, no personal items, bright and inviting atmosphere
packet.negative_prompt: Visible brand logos, identifiable personal items, people, watermarks, text overlays, editorial or news scenes, copyrighted designs, public figures
packet.technical_specs: High resolution, natural lighting emphasis, sharp focus on desk and plants, soft shadows

parts.text: Cozy, well-organized home office desk with minimalist design, open laptop with generic screen, indoor houseplants, coffee mug, warm natural light through window, neutral color palette, no people, no logos, no personal items

Cozy, well-organized home office desk with minimalist design, open laptop with generic screen, indoor houseplants, coffee mug, warm natural light streaming through window, neutral color palette, clean and clutter-free workspace, no people, no logos, no text, no personal items, bright and inviting atmosphere

Compose the final stock image for a 16:9 aspect ratio. Use framing, subject placement, and copy space appropriate for 16:9 stock usage.

Technical specs: High resolution, natural lighting emphasis, sharp focus on desk and plants, soft shadows

Stock safety requirements: non-editorial commercial stock image; no real people or public figures; no brands, logos, trademarks, copyrighted characters, protected product designs, readable text, or watermarks.

Negative prompt: Visible brand logos, identifiable personal items, people, watermarks, text overlays, editorial or news scenes, copyrighted designs, public figures
